headline_neutral: Manifesto attributed to White House Correspondents’ Dinner shooting suspect is published

claims.statement: Cole Allen believed it was his duty to target administration officials
Cole Allen stated that security at the event was insufficient
Sources said Cole Allen sent the manifesto about 10 minutes before the attack

context: The White House Correspondents’ Dinner is an annual event attended by officials and media.
Cole Allen traveled from Torrance, California to Washington, DC before the event.
Law enforcement agencies responded to the shooting incident.
The manifesto included statements of intent and personal reflections.
